entry.title: Courses @ CMU
entry.content:
Hated. Taken. Liked. Loved.

Fall 2022 (Current)

  • 18-344 Computer Systems and the Hardware-Software Interface
  • 18-290 Signals and Systems
  • 10-301 Introduction to Machine Learning
  • 76-270 Writing for the Professions

Spring 2022

  • 18-240 Structure and Design of Digital Systems
  • 15-150 Principles of Functional Programming
  • 36-226 Introduction to Statistical Inference
  • 15-281 Artificial Intelligence: Representation and Problem Solving
  • 98-008 Shilling The Rust Programming Language

Fall 2021

  • 18-213 Introduction to Computer Systems
  • 36-225 Introduction to Probability Theory
  • 21-241 Matrices and Linear Transformations
  • 73-102 Principles of Microeconomics

Spring 2021

  • 15-122 Principles of Imperative Computation
  • 18-100 Introduction to Electrical and Computer Engineering
  • 76-101 Interpretation and Argument
  • 21-127 Concepts of Mathematics

Fall 2020

  • 21-259 Calculus in Three Dimensions
  • 15-112 Fundamentals of Programming and Computer Science
  • 24-101 Fundamentals of Mechanical Engineering
  • 39-109 Grand Challenge Freshman Seminar: Climate Change
